pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh copy target
Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly specify Channel 1
Task instructions and verifier.py logic require turning off channels 2 through 8
Task instructions and verifier.py visual verification explicitly specify the EMG widget

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to configure the OpenBCI GUI for single-channel EMG using the file OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt. The required configuration specifically targets Channel 1 while disabling channels 2-8 in the EMG widget. The data originates from Subject S001 of the PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset, converted into the OpenBCI text format.
